opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I've had this low-grade fever and night sweats for two weeks, I feel completely drained, and now these sore red bumps have appeared on my fingertips.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Two weeks of fever, night sweats and exhaustion, and now painful red bumps on the fingertips, prompted an urgent call.

symptom_narrative.duration: 14 days of low-grade fever, chills and drenching night sweats, steadily wearing him down
symptom_narrative.character: feverish and shivery with soaking night sweats, deep exhaustion and aching muscles; now painful red bumps on the finger pads
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: so drained he is mostly stuck in bed, and the finger bumps are exquisitely painful
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: whole-body fevers and aches; painful bumps on the pads of the index and middle fingers
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: fevers and sweats worse at night; the finger bumps appeared suddenly yesterday
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing much; paracetamol barely touches it
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: exertion of any kind; he is too weak to do much
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: about 3 kg of unintentional weight loss over the fortnight; denies blood in the urine and denies chest pain, but feels generally very unwell
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: nothing like this before; mentions he was born with a heart valve difference (bicuspid aortic valve)
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: mostly bedbound with fatigue and muscle aches; too weak to cook or look after himself properly

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: born with a heart valve difference (a bicuspid aortic valve)
past_medical_history.how_managed: known about it for years, not on any particular treatment

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone and is currently too weak to prepare adequate meals

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: has been trying to wait out what he assumed was a virus; worried now the bumps have appeared, and concerned about coping alone

communication_style.typical_message_style: answers briefly, sounds unwell and tired
